member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.
member.param: String to be checked for or empty.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfBufferTooSmall(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfOutOfRange``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the collection is , or if it is empty.
member.param: The collection to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentNullException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.summary: Throws an .

A message that describes the error.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
The value of the argument that caused this exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.InvalidOperationException(System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfLessThan(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is less than min.
member.param: Number to be expected being less than min.
The number that must be less than the argument.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IHostNameFeature
member.summary: Exposes the host name of the end point.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IHostNameFeature.HostName
member.summary: Gets the host name of the end point.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointBuilder
member.summary: Builder to create a instances.

member.summary: Gets the endpoints.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointBuilder.Features
member.summary: Gets the feature collection.

member.summary: Adds a change token to the resulting .
member.param: The change token.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointProvider
member.summary: Provides details about a service's endpoints.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointProvider.PopulateAsync(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointBuilder,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves the endpoints for the service.
member.param: The endpoint collection, which resolved endpoints will be added to.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointProviderFactory
member.summary: Creates instances.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointProviderFactory.TryCreateProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery,Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.IServiceEndpointProvider@)
member.summary: Tries to create an instance for the specified .
member.param: The service to create the provider for.
The provider.
member.returns: if the provider was created, otherwise.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Represents an endpoint for a service.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpoint.EndPoint
member.summary: Gets the endpoint.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpoint.Features
member.summary: Gets the collection of endpoint features.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpoint.Create(System.Net.EndPoint,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.Features.IFeatureCollection)
member.summary: Creates a new .
member.param: The endpoint being represented.
Features of the endpoint.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpoint.TryParse(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpoint@)
member.summary: Tries to convert a specified string representation to its equivalent, and returns a value that indicates whether the conversion succeeded.
member.param: A string that consists of an IP address or hostname, optionally followed by a colon and port number, or a URI.
When this method returns, contains the equivalent if the conversion succeeded; otherwise, . This parameter is passed uninitialized; any value originally supplied will be overwritten.
member.returns: if the string was successfully parsed into a ; otherwise, .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery
member.summary: Describes a query for endpoints of a service.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery.#ctor(System.String,System.String[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance.
member.param: The string which the query was constructed from.
The ordered list of included URI schemes.
The service name.
The optional endpoint name.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery.TryParse(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery@)
member.summary: Tries to parse the provided input as a service endpoint query.
member.param: The value to parse.
The resulting query.
member.returns: if the value was successfully parsed; otherwise .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery.IncludedSchemes
member.summary: Gets the ordered list of included URI schemes.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery.EndpointName
member.summary: Gets the endpoint name, or if no endpoint name is specified.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointQuery.ServiceName
member.summary: Gets the service name.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointSource
member.summary: Represents a collection of service endpoints.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance.
member.param: The endpoints.
The change token.
The feature collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointSource.Endpoints
member.summary: Gets the endpoints.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointSource.ChangeToken
member.summary: Gets the change token which indicates when this collection should be refreshed.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointSource.Features
member.summary: Gets the feature collection.
